title: Add isAnimating Try/Finally Safety Reset
summary: If animation throws an error, isAnimating stays true and locks the UI. Wrap animation code in try/finally to guarantee reset.

tasks.description: Wrap runSimulation and runAnimated in try/finally blocks to ensure isAnimating is always reset on any exit path.
acceptance_criteria: isAnimating is reset to false even if an error occurs during simulation
isAnimating is reset to false even if an error occurs during animated run
